title: Reggae on the Rooftop
description: Live reggae bands, craft cocktails, and skyline views. Perfect end-of-week vibes.

title: Dad's Garage Interactive Improv
description: Award-winning improv comedy where every show is made up on the spot. Audience suggestions = the whole show.

title: EYEDRUM Gallery: New Exhibits
description: Atlanta's experimental art space featuring emerging Southeastern artists. Great for inspiring conversation.

title: Atlanta BeltLine Eastside Trail Walk
location: Ponce City Market to Krog Street Tunnel
description: Walk the iconic trail, stop for frozen treats at Bigoli, browse the Krog Street Market. Great for couples.

title: Second Sunday at the High Museum
description: Free admission on the second Sunday of every month. Featured exhibit: contemporary Southern photography.
